creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have python=3.3 and python3=3.3 in my /etc/make.conf and this brings:

RefactoringTool: Adding transformation: zip
RefactoringTool: Can't open /usr/local/home/pi/myp/databases/py-sqlalchemy/work/stage/usr/local/home/pi/myp/databases/py-sqlalchemy/work/SQLAlchemy-0.9.7/doc: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/usr/local/home/pi/myp/databases/py-sqlalchemy/work/stage/usr/local/home/pi/myp/databases/py-sqlalchemy/work/SQLAlchemy-0.9.7/doc'
RefactoringTool: No files need to be modified.
RefactoringTool: There was 1 error:
RefactoringTool: Can't open /usr/local/home/pi/myp/databases/py-sqlalchemy/work/stage/usr/local/home/pi/myp/databases/py-sqlalchemy/work/SQLAlchemy-0.9.7/doc: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/usr/local/home/pi/myp/databases/py-sqlalchemy/work/stage/usr/local/home/pi/myp/databases/py-sqlalchemy/work/SQLAlchemy-0.9.7/doc'
*** Error code 1

Any idea ? I'm by no means a python guy...
